description: Structured metadata describing the standalone converters so they can be promoted to dedicated repositories or git submodules without lossy manual steps.

converters.name: node
notes: tsconfig.json is scoped to src and excludes *.test.ts to keep the published bundle clean.
Jest configuration lives at the project root; update jest.config.js if the converter is moved to its own repo.

converters.name: rust
notes: Cargo.toml exposes both native and wasm targets; keep version parity with the Node converter.
pkg/ is generated; ensure it is ignored or published via npm as needed.
